chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 3364 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES D/O matter: 1. For hearing of CMA No.27779/2024 (U/S 151 CPC) 2. For hearing of CMA No.16468/2024 (Amount) 28.08.2025 Ms. Saima Syed, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Respondent. -------------------------------------- Instant petition was disposed of vide order dated 15.07.2024. Pursuant to the noted order, the Petitioner deposited the disputed amount before the Nazir of this Court. Subsequently, it is submitted by the learned counsel for the petitioner that Customs Appellate Tribunal decided the appeal in favour of the petitioner vide judgment dated 05.10.2024. Thereafter, the concerned Collectorate issued NOC to the Nazir of this Court indicating therein that the dispute has been resolved. Contention of the counsel appears to be correct. Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the respondent has accorded her no objection to the grant of listed application. Accordingly, the application is allowed as prayed. Nazir is directed to release the amount deposited pursuant to order dated 15.07.2024 along with any profit accumulated thereon. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem
